package fixture

import "context"

// ServerboundEncode is the symmetric encoder for ServerboundDecode. Wire
// shape is identical: byte + int + short + string. Used by the
// Encode↔Decode equivalence test (task-065 item 7) to confirm the analyzer
// produces the same Call list whether it walks a writer (Write*) or a
// reader (Read*) method body.
type ServerboundEncode struct{}

func (m ServerboundEncode) Encode(l interface{}, ctx context.Context) func(map[string]interface{}) []byte {
	w := newWriter()
	return func(opts map[string]interface{}) []byte {
		w.WriteByte(0)
		w.WriteInt(1)
		w.WriteShort(2)
		w.WriteAsciiString("hi")
		return w.Bytes()
	}
}
